rationale.summary: Multiple critical metrics have breached rollback thresholds simultaneously since the Smart Payment Routing v2.0 launch on 2026-03-31. The crash rate is at 3.45% (threshold: 2.0%), API latency p95 at 1020ms (threshold: 800ms), and payment success rate at 88.7% (threshold: 92%). User sentiment is 44.4% negative with confirmed double-charge incidents.
key_drivers: API Latency p95: 1020 milliseconds (+185.0% vs pre-launch)
Payment Success Rate: 88.7 percent (-6.0% vs pre-launch)
Support Ticket Volume: 445 tickets/day (+263.1% vs pre-launch)
rationale.feedback_summary: 45 feedback entries analyzed. 44.4% negative. Top pain points: payment failure, double charge, slow loading. NPS proxy: -11.1.
rationale.pm_framing: 5 critical metrics have breached rollback thresholds.
rationale.critic_note: Roll Back immediately. The confluence of a payment success rate collapse, confirmed double-charge incidents, crash rate above rollback threshold, and a 430% support ticket surge indicates a systemic failure - not transient noise.

risk_register.impact: Increased API latency -> payment timeouts -> revenue loss
risk_register.mitigation: Downgrade to v3.1.1 or implement SDK warm-up pre-call. Hotfix ETA: 4h.

risk_register.risk: DB migration lock causing read contention on transactions table
risk_register.impact: Intermittent payment processing failures during peak hours
risk_register.evidence: Known pre-launch risk - not confirmed as root cause yet
risk_register.mitigation: Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on routing queries. Optimize with index on routing_events.created_at.

risk_register.risk: ML routing model mis-classifying transactions leading to wrong gateway selection
risk_register.impact: Payment failures for micro-transactions; cascading retry storms
risk_register.evidence: User reports of 'routing to wrong gateway'; model confidence < 8% for <₹500 txns
risk_register.mitigation: Disable ML routing for transactions < ₹500 immediately; use static fallback rules.

risk_register.risk: Double-charge incidents due to gateway health cache stale data
risk_register.impact: User trust erosion, chargeback liability, possible regulatory attention
risk_register.evidence: 15+ support tickets reporting double deduction; cache TTL bug identified in release notes
risk_register.mitigation: Emergency cache flush NOW. Deploy R-004-hotfix to invalidate stale gateway cache. Proactive refund batch for affected users.

risk_register.impact: Delayed resolution of payment failures -> churn acceleration
risk_register.mitigation: Activate T2 support surge team. Deploy chatbot auto-response for known issues. Triage double-charge tickets as P0.

risk_register.risk: Cascading user churn if rollback is delayed
risk_register.impact: D1 retention declined 21.7%; continued decline will compress revenue
risk_register.evidence: DAU dropped 13.3% in 7 days post-launch; retention trend is monotonically decreasing
risk_register.mitigation: Rollback or pause within next 2 hours. Offer retention incentive to recently churned users.

risk_register.risk: Payment success rate below 90% - approaching regulatory reporting threshold
risk_register.impact: Possible RBI / payment network compliance violations if sustained
risk_register.mitigation: Immediate rollback. Brief legal/compliance team. Prepare incident report.

24h.action: Execute rollback: flip feature flag `payment_routing_v2` to false
Emergency cache flush for gateway health cache
Identify all double-charge affected users; initiate batch refunds
Publish internal incident report to leadership + on-call
Post user-facing status update acknowledging payment issues
Activate T2 support surge team; triage all P0 tickets
Verify payment success rate recovers to >98% post-rollback

48h.action: Root cause analysis (RCA) document: identify crash_rate and latency root cause
Fix payment-router-sdk cold-start latency (downgrade or warm-up strategy)
Disable ML routing for transactions < ₹500; use static fallback rules
Fix gateway health cache stale data bug (cache invalidation hotfix)
Review and harden DB migration locking strategy
Design A/B test framework for Smart Routing v2.1 re-launch (5% canary)
Send personalized apology + compensation offer to all affected users
iOS Safari payment modal CSS fix deployment

communication_plan.internal: Elevated negativity signal. Monitor closely and prepare escalation draft.
communication_plan.external: Post in-app banner: 'We are aware of payment issues and our team is working on a fix.'

confidence_boosters: Confirm root cause of crash_rate spike (crash dump analysis)
A/B test data isolating new routing logic vs baseline
Exact count of double-charge affected users from DB query
Real-time payment success rate per gateway (Stripe vs Razorpay vs PayU breakdown)
D1 retention for cohort exposed ONLY to new routing (not entire user base)
ML model routing decision audit log for past 48 hours

pm.user_impact: Payment failures and crash spikes are directly degrading the checkout experience for active users. Retention decline signals users are abandoning the platform post-launch. User trust is at risk.

key_findings: Day-7 Retention Rate decreased by 15.6% [Status: WARNING, Anomaly: low]
Crash Rate increased by 374.6% [Status: CRITICAL, Anomaly: medium]
API Latency p95 increased by 185.0% [Status: CRITICAL, Anomaly: medium]
Payment Success Rate decreased by 6.0% [Status: CRITICAL, Anomaly: critical]
Support Ticket Volume increased by 263.1% [Status: CRITICAL, Anomaly: critical]
data_analyst.confidence_note: High confidence on payment_success_rate and crash_rate (clear monotonic degradation). Lower confidence on feature_adoption (only 7 post-launch data points).

perceptual_risks: Multiple reports of double charges - legal/chargeback liability risk
High-volume payment failure complaints - churn acceleration likely

risk.critic_recommendation: Roll Back immediately. The confluence of a payment success rate collapse, confirmed double-charge incidents, crash rate above rollback threshold, and a 430% support ticket surge indicates a systemic failure - not transient noise.
assumption_challenges: CHALLENGE [Data]: 4 CRITICAL metrics simultaneously - this is not a coincidence. Root cause is likely systemic (SDK or ML model), not individual metric noise.
evidence_gaps: Root cause of crash_rate spike not yet identified - is it SDK, ML model, or DB?
No A/B test data available to isolate new routing logic impact vs. baseline
Double-charge affected user count unknown - quantify before proceeding
iOS Safari affected user % unknown - may be larger than assumed

tool_call_trace.output_summary: Built risk register: 7 risks (3 Critical, 3 High)
